task_completion.description: Open the Electrical Engineering Calculations app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the Electrical Engineering Calculations app (com.hsn.electricalcalculations) is open and active.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified reel and cable dimensions into the calculator
task_completion.visual_evidence: The values for Flange Diameter (800), Barrel/Core Diameter (400), Traverse/Width (500), Edge Clearance (50), and Cable Diameter (16) are visible in the input fields of a calculator interface.

task_completion.description: Calculate and display the maximum cable length
task_completion.visual_evidence: A calculated result for the cable capacity is visible on the screen. The expected value should be approximately 597.9 meters (or within the 300-600 range).
A terminal command (e.g., echo), text editor, or file manager shows the creation of '/sdcard/reel_capacity.txt' containing the calculated capacity.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the calculator to '/sdcard/reel_capacity_evidence.png'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., screencap) or built-in screenshot tool is used to save the screen showing the inputs and result to the path '/sdcard/reel_capacity_evidence.png'.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical user interface to perform the calculation
integrity.visual_evidence: The calculation was performed inside an app's GUI, not bypassed by running a Python script or terminal math command to generate the answer.

integrity.description: The saved screenshot is a genuine capture of the agent's workspace
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot saved to '/sdcard/reel_capacity_evidence.png' corresponds to a state actually reached and visible in the agent's trajectory.

integrity.description: The agent did not hardcode or hallucinate the final answer
integrity.visual_evidence: The value saved to the text file exactly matches the result that was visually displayed on the calculator screen during the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires calculating cable reel capacity using specific inputs: Flange 800mm, Barrel 400mm, Width 500mm, Clearance 50mm, and Cable Diameter 16mm. The mathematically correct capacity is approximately 597.9 meters (acceptable range: 300-600 meters). CRITICAL NOTE: The specified app (com.hsn.electricalcalculations) does NOT actually contain a 'Cable Reel Capacity' calculator in its official feature list. The agent may fail to find it, attempt to use a different tool, or hallucinate. Score strictly based on whether the agent successfully inputted the values into a GUI calculator and saved the required files as specified.
